◎简　　介  

　　Baahubali: The Lost Legends is based on India's biggest blockbuster film franchise. The animated series is set before the Kalakeya invasion depicted in the movie, when Baahubali and Bhallaladeva are still both young princes of Mahishmati. Two brothers competing to rule the greatest kingdom of its age and the epic adventures they must endure to prove they are worthy to one day w...
